name: codex-quota-widget-rs
description: 通过 Codex CLI 读取 Codex 额度的 Rust 版悬浮小组件。
author: fengshi

scripts.updater:keygen: pwsh -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "New-Item -ItemType Directory -Path certs -Force | Out-Null; tauri signer generate --write-keys certs/updater.key"
scripts.release:github: npm run tauri:build:nsis:updater && npm run updater:latest
